title: Envoy Circuit Breaker Open Events by Cluster
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder, Splunk Connect for Syslog, or HTTP Event Collector; `props.conf`/`transforms.conf` for listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=proxy sourcetype="envoy:stats"
| search metric_name="*circuit_breakers*open*" OR metric_name="*cx_open*"
| eval v=tonumber(metric_value)
| where v > 0
| timechart span=1m max(v) by cluster_name
description: Open breakers shed load but indicate real upstream pain.
value: Prioritizes which service mesh cluster needs attention.
implementation: Scrape via OpenTelemetry Collector or Telegraf; normalize `cluster_name` label.
visualization: Time series for rates and latency, top/dedup for hotspots, single-value alerts on health thresholds.
grandmaExplanation: We see when Envoy stops sending traffic to protect upstreams.
